geocode.source: Bronx and Pelham Parkway and Stillwell Avenue

name: New York, New Haven, and Hartford Railroad Company
topic: Railroad tracks -- New York (State) -- New York

text:
Bronx and Pelham Parkway, east from about Stillwell Ave., across the bridge over the tracks of the New York, New Haven and Hartford Railroad.

August 3, 1928.

P. L. Sperr.
title: Bronx: Bronx and Pelham Par - Stillwell Avenue
